components.name: Windows-driver-samples
components.purpose: SysVAD virtual audio endpoint base for the SensorBridge virtual microphone
components.notes: Requires Visual Studio, WDK, administrator installation, test signing for development, and production driver signing before distribution.

components.name: libusbmuxd
components.purpose: Optional USBMux client and proxy tooling for USB transport.
components.notes: Windows normally also depends on Apple Mobile Device Support or a compatible usbmux service.
